required_preferences.fact: Attends mandatory in-person training sessions on weekday evenings as scheduled; no longer completes training modules online at home

supersedes.fact: Completes online training modules on Sunday evenings rather than squeezed in during work breaks

required_preferences.fact: Handles family errands for her mother both spontaneously and by appointment, accommodating urgent post-surgery requests that can't be planned in advance

supersedes.fact: Always organizes family errands in advance — never does spontaneous trips when helping her mother

required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes resolving customer issues within call time limits over thorough troubleshooting, due to increased manager oversight and performance plan requirements
Uses blackout curtains not only for nighttime but also for daytime sleep during early-morning shift weeks to improve rest
Sets up a rotating childcare calendar with her sister, ensuring that each has dedicated work and rest periods per day while covering niece supervision shifts
Plans movie nights with friends at indie theaters — avoids blockbuster multiplexes

persona: An entry-level support agent at a regional telecommunications provider
